title: Kidambi Srikanth Falls in US Open Final
indian_angle: Indian star Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing his continued form on the international circuit.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open came to an end in the final, where he was defeated by Su Li Yang.

title: Srikanth's Sportsmanship Shines in US Open Semifinal
indian_angle: This story highlights Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth's integrity and sportsmanship during his US Open semifinal match.
summary: A look back at a remarkable moment in Kidambi Srikanth's US Open semifinal where he voluntarily overturned a point awarded to him, demonstrating exemplary sportsmanship.

title: Rounak Chouhan Stuns World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan delivered a major upset by defeating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a sensation at the US Open by beating the much higher-ranked Chou Tien Chen.

title: Asian Games Squad Reunites, Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: India's top badminton players, including the Thomas Cup heroes and Treesa-Gayatri, are reassembling to prepare for the upcoming Asian Games.
summary: The Indian badminton squad for the Asian Games, featuring key players like PV Sindhu, Lakshya Sen, and the returning Treesa-Gayatri, has begun preparations.

title: Tanvi Sharma's Game: Saina or Sindhu Style?
indian_angle: This article analyzes the playing style of promising young Indian shuttler Tanvi Sharma, comparing her to legends Saina Nehwal and PV Sindhu.
summary: An in-depth look at the evolving game of young Indian talent Tanvi Sharma, drawing comparisons to the tactical approaches of Saina Nehwal and PV Sindhu.
